category_sources: source_facts.description says it browses latest git branches; official README says git recent browses latest local git branches.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-recent; official GitHub repository and README use git recent/git-recent.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents installation, usage, fzf UI, git recent, and git recent-og.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/paulirish/git-recent, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions latest git branches; official README describes browsing recent branches, checking out selections, and viewing diffs.
